perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a green long-sleeved crop top and white pants holds up a white T-shirt with blue and yellow polka dots in front of a decorated Christmas tree. (2) She lays the T-shirt on a round white table and uses scissors to cut the bottom hem into numerous thin vertical strips. (3) Close-up shots show her hands tying pairs of these strips together in knots to close the bottom of the garment. (4) She folds the shirt in half and cuts along the armholes and neckline to transform the torso into a bag shape with thick straps. (5) She cuts the straps into three sections each and braids them together to create decorative handles. (6) She ties the ends of the braids and proudly displays the finished fringed bag, carrying it on her arm and shoulder while smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat acoustic background music starts with a bright piano and percussion. A female voice speaks in a lively, high-pitched, and enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) As she begins cutting, the sound of rhythmic scissor 'snips' is mixed with her voice. (3) The narration continues with a helpful instructional tone, occasionally punctuated by 'ding' and sparkle sound effects during key visual transitions. (4) The music remains consistent in energy until the end, where her voice becomes even more excited as she reveals the final product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'Too old? Can't bear to throw away haha baby clothes?' appears with an emotional, questioning tone. (2) Functional text: 'Step 1: Cut into long strips', 'No sewing machine needed, just tie knots' provides instructions. (3) Decorative text: 'Tie! Tie! Tie!', 'DIY Tassle Bag' appears in a variety-show style with colorful fonts to emphasize key moments. (4) Closing text: 'Handheld or Shoulder bag' highlights the versatility of the product.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Step-by-step DIY Demonstration -> Final Product Reveal and Styling

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing the DIY task.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a green long-sleeved crop top with 'haha baby' printed on it and high-waisted white trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a decorated Christmas tree with ornaments, a white round table, and shelving with stuffed toys and festive decorations.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio lighting that highlights the craft process.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a creative DIY tutorial demonstrating how to upcycle an old T-shirt into a stylish fringed bag. By showing a simple process that requires no sewing, it encourages sustainable fashion practices and promotes the 'haha baby' clothing brand through integrated product use.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator wears a 'haha baby' top and specifically mentions the brand's clothing as the material for the DIY project.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration, variety-show style text graphics, and a Christmas-themed domestic background.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young parents or fans of the brand 'haha baby' (owned by Taiwanese YouTuber Er Ni), blending lifestyle content with practical craft tips.
